lemon_market_new_listings.description: Poor condition.

This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior has minor cosmetic imperfections but no significant damage. The interior is clean with slight wear from normal use. The engine runs well and the vehicle is reliable.
The car is in good condition. The exterior has minor cosmetic imperfections, and the interior shows light wear. It is mechanically sound and has been well-maintained.

Looking for your next great project? This vehicle is the perfect starting point for anyone who loves to roll up their sleeves and bring a car back to life! While it definitely requires some serious mechanical attention and bodywork to get back to its former glory, it offers a fantastic opportunity to own a classic model at a bargain price. Whether you're looking for a dedicated parts donor or a full restoration challenge, this car is ready for its next chapter!

This vehicle is in good condition and has been consistently well-maintained. The exterior paint shows a healthy shine, with only minor stone chips on the hood and a small scratch on the rear passenger door. Inside, the cabin is clean and smoke-free, though there is some light wear on the driver's seat bolster. Mechanically, the car is sound, with a smooth engine and transmission. It has recently undergone a routine service and passed inspection. This is a solid, dependable vehicle ready for its next owner.

This vehicle is in good overall condition, reflecting careful ownership and regular maintenance. The exterior paint presents well with a nice luster, though there are minor cosmetic imperfections including a few small stone chips on the hood and light scuffing on the lower rear bumper. Inside, the interior is well-preserved with some gentle wear on the driver’s seat and steering wheel, but remains clean and free of odors. All electronics, including the infotainment and climate control, function perfectly. Mechanically

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to an exacting standard that mirrors its original showroom state. Every facet of this automobile, from its pristine exterior finish to its meticulously preserved cabin, reflects a history of uncompromising stewardship. Mechanically superior and aesthetically flawless, this specimen offers a rare opportunity for the discerning enthusiast to acquire a vehicle of peerless quality and integrity. Experience a standard of excellence that distinguishes this offering as a premier investment in its class.

Hey there! You have seriously got to see this beauty! I’ve treated this car like my absolute pride and joy, and it shows—it’s in truly pristine, showroom condition. Not a single scratch or smudge to be found, and it drives like an absolute dream. I'm honestly a bit sad to see it go, but I’m looking for a great new home for it. If you're looking for perfection on wheels, this is the one for you! Feel free to reach out with any questions!

2022 Sedan. Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No mechanical issues. Clean title.

Presenting a truly exceptional, showroom-quality vehicle that satisfies the most discerning collector's standards. This car has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled environment, resulting in an exterior finish that is absolutely flawless, with deep, mirror-like paint and zero stone chips or swirl marks. The interior remains in 'as-new' condition, featuring supple leather upholstery that still carries the factory aroma, with no creasing on the bolsters or wear on the touchpoints. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach; it boasts a comprehensive, documented service history performed exclusively by master technicians using OEM parts. Every electronic component, from the premium sound system to the advanced driver assists, functions exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. It has never seen rain or snow and has been professionally detailed and ceramic-coated to ensure its longevity. This sale includes both original keys, the factory window sticker, and all owner’s manuals. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a benchmark example of this model in peerless condition.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled distinction. This vehicle remains in impeccable, showroom-ready condition, reflecting a legacy of meticulous preservation and uncompromising care. Every surface, mechanical component, and interior detail adheres to the highest standards of excellence, offering the discerning collector a rare opportunity to acquire a truly pristine, investment-grade asset. Experience the pinnacle of refined engineering in a state that defies its age and surpasses all expectations.

We are pleased to present this impeccably maintained vehicle, which stands as a definitive example of its class. Preserved in showroom condition, the exterior retains its original factory luster, while the interior remains entirely unblemished. Every mechanical component has been subjected to a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure peerless performance and reliability. This offering represents a rare opportunity for the discerning enthusiast to acquire a vehicle of uncompromising quality and provenance.

Hey there! Are you ready to fall in love with your next ride? I’m parting with this absolute beauty, and let me tell you, she is in stunning, showroom condition! It’s been pampered since day one and looks like it just rolled off the lot. No scratches, no dents—just pure perfection. You won’t find another one this clean! Come take a look and see for yourself, you won't be disappointed!

Mint condition. Zero mechanical issues. Original paint. Interior flawless. Service records available.

Presenting an absolute gem for the discerning collector: a vehicle that looks and drives as if it just rolled off the showroom floor. This car has been meticulously garage-kept and pampered, featuring a flawless exterior with a deep, mirror-like luster completely free of stone chips or swirl marks. Inside, the cabin is a time capsule; the premium leather remains supple and unscratched, the buttons show zero wear, and it retains that distinct new-car aroma. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach, boasting a full-service history with every scheduled maintenance performed strictly by certified technicians. Every seal, gasket, and component is in peak condition, providing a whisper-quiet ride and factory-spec performance. This is a rare, investment-grade example that satisfies even the most rigorous inspection.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled distinction. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, having been preserved with fastidious attention to detail. Every surface reflects a commitment to excellence, offering the discerning collector or enthusiast an opportunity to acquire a truly pristine example. Mechanically and aesthetically, it stands as a testament to superior stewardship and remains beyond reproach.

We are proud to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to an impeccable standard that defies its age. This unit represents the pinnacle of its class, preserved in showroom condition with an interior and exterior that remain entirely unblemished. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this vehicle offers an unrivaled driving experience and investment-grade quality.

Hey everyone! I’m honestly so sad to see this beauty go, but it’s time for it to find a new home. This car is in absolutely incredible shape—honestly, it looks and smells just like it did the day it was bought! I’ve taken such good care of it, keeping it polished and garage-stored. It drives like a dream and is truly in flawless condition. You won’t find another one this clean! Come take a look and fall in love!

Offering a museum-grade E46 M3 featuring the legendary S54 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six. This example boasts a pristine powertrain with factory individual throttle bodies and a meticulously maintained VANOS system. The drivetrain is anchored by a Getrag 420G six-speed manual transmission and a 3.62 limited-slip differential, ensuring optimal power delivery. Critical preventative maintenance, including rod bearing replacement and rear subframe reinforcement, has been completed to exacting standards. The chassis retains its factory torsional rigidity, paired with an unblemished suspension for surgical handling. This is a collector-quality specimen with flawless exterior finish and a showroom-fresh
Mint condition. Flawless paint and interior. No mechanical issues. Clean title in hand.

Presenting a truly exceptional, collector-grade vehicle that looks and drives as if it just rolled off the showroom floor. This car has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled environment, resulting in an exterior finish that is absolutely flawless, with a deep, mirror-like shine and zero imperfections. The interior is equally pristine, featuring supple leather upholstery with no visible wear, original factory floor mats, and a cabin that still retains that fresh, new-car scent. Every feature, from the advanced infotainment system to the dual-zone climate control, operates perfectly. Under the hood, the engine bay is spotless, reflecting a rigorous maintenance schedule performed exclusively by certified technicians. With exceptionally low mileage and a comprehensive service history, this vehicle offers a rare opportunity to own a piece of automotive perfection. It is, without question, the finest example of its kind available on the market today.

Presenting an exemplary specimen of automotive excellence, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, featuring a flawless exterior profile and a pristine, meticulously preserved interior. Every mechanical system has been rigorously inspected to ensure peak performance, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from a new acquisition. A rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast who prioritizes absolute quality and documented provenance.

We are pleased to present an exceptional vehicle maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This specimen exemplifies showroom-quality preservation, featuring a flawless exterior finish and an interior cabin devoid of any discernible wear. Mechanically, the vehicle operates with the precision of its original assembly, reflecting a history of meticulous stewardship. For the discerning enthusiast who demands uncompromising quality, this vehicle represents the definitive pinnacle of its class.

Hey there! You honestly have to see this car to believe it. It's been my absolute pride and joy, and I've kept it in showroom condition—not a single scratch or speck of dust anywhere! It drives like a dream and feels just like it did the day it rolled off the lot. I'm only letting it go because I'm looking for something a bit bigger for the family, but I know the next owner is going to fall in love with it just like I did. Come take a look and see for yourself!

Offering an investment-grade 2004 BMW M3 (E46) featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six power plant. This example is mechanically pristine, showcasing a fully overhauled VANOS system with Beisan components and a proactively reinforced rear subframe with TMS plates. The drivetrain utilizes a crisp ZF 6-speed manual transmission paired with a factory limited-slip differential that remains tight and responsive. Performance is further refined by a Bilstein PSS10 coilover setup, offering adjustable damping for optimized corner-balance without compromising chassis rigidity. The cooling system has been fully refreshed with a Stewart high-flow water pump and an aluminum radiator to ensure thermal efficiency under load. With zero rod-bearing play and a documented service history, this vehicle represents a turn-key opportunity for the purist seeking peak atmospheric performance.
Mint condition. Garage kept. No mechanical issues. Clean title in hand.

Offered here is a truly exceptional example of automotive preservation. This vehicle remains in showroom-quality condition, having been meticulously garage-kept and pampered by its sole owner. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like gloss with original paint that has been protected by a professional ceramic coating; there are absolutely no dings, chips, or scratches to be found. Step inside to an interior that still retains that new-car scent, with supple, uncreased leather upholstery and a dash that remains factory-fresh. Every electronic component, from the premium sound system to the dual-zone climate control, functions flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, boasting a complete, documented service history from authorized dealerships. It drives as smoothly as the day it rolled off the assembly line, with crisp gear shifts and a powerful, responsive engine. Included with the sale are all original manuals, two sets of master keys, and a folder of maintenance receipts. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning enthusiast to own a vehicle that looks and feels brand new.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard of excellence. This specimen remains in pristine condition, reflecting a level of care typically reserved for private collections. Every mechanical and aesthetic detail has been rigorously vetted to ensure it meets our highest benchmarks for quality. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle that presents in near-showroom state, offering a peerless driving experience for the discerning enthusiast.
